entity.summary: Intent-based decentralized exchange and liquidity-routing protocol that matches peer-to-peer swap intents and aggregates external DeFi liquidity to reduce slippage and harmful MEV.
entity.notes: HEI models BarterSwap's peer-to-peer intent matching, DEX aggregation, direct DEX liquidity, Ethereum activity, and the BarterSwap Superposition discovery representation as one exchange entity. Superposition is not treated as a separate exchange identity here.

evidence.title: BarterSwap trading application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application preserves the BarterSwap trading identity and intent-based swap surface.

evidence.title: BarterSwap DEX and aggregator metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current non-zero direct DEX volume and substantial DEX-aggregator volume for BarterSwap, corroborating active exchange operation and consolidating the Superposition-labelled source row.
